card.title: VIP
card.description: Vasoactive Intestinal Peptide (VIP) is a naturally occurring peptide that plays a key role in immune regulation and maintaining a balanced inflammatory response, supporting gut and overall health.
card.finePrint: No membership required. We bill & ship quarterly and you can cancel your subscription at any time. Due to state regulations we cannot ship test...

benefits.title: Supports Immune Balance
benefits.description: Helps regulate cytokine activity, contributing to a balanced inflammatory response.

benefits.title: Promotes a Healthy Sleep Cycle
benefits.description: Plays a role in maintaining the body’s internal clock, supporting a steady sleep cycle.

benefits.title: Encourages Circulation & Recovery
benefits.description: Supports smooth muscle relaxation, aiding blood flow, digestion, and overall recovery.

splitContent.title: The VIP treatment your body deserves
splitContent.subTitle: VIP is composed of 28 amino acid residues and is known to have numerous effects on development, growth, and the function of neuronal, epithelial, and endocrine cells.

quotes.quote: “Shortly after starting VIP I felt clarity in my head, my stomach bloating was reduced, inflammation was noticeably reduced, and I’ve been sleeping better. I won’t go without my VIP spray!”
quotes.author: Suzanne Laughlin

faqs.title: Have Questions? We're Here to Help

items.question: What is VIP?
items.answer: You can expect personalized treatment plans, licensed medical support, and continuous follow-up designed around your goals.

items.question: How is VIP administered?
items.answer: Coverage depends on your plan and location. We provide transparent pricing and documentation you can use for reimbursement when eligible.

items.question: Are there any side effects of VIP?
items.answer: Yes, many of our services can be paid using HSA/FSA cards. Eligibility may vary by provider and treatment type.

items.question: Can VIP be used with other treatments?
items.answer: At the moment, services and fulfillment are focused on approved U.S. regions where our providers are licensed.

items.question: Do you accept insurance?
items.answer: Your care team includes qualified clinicians and support staff who guide you through onboarding, treatment, and progress tracking.

items.question: Can I use my HSA or FSA?
items.answer: No problem. Reach out to our support team and we will help you quickly with any additional questions.

items.question: Who is my health coach?
items.answer: No problem. Reach out to our support team and we will help you quickly with any additional questions.

items.question: I have another question for you.
items.answer: No problem. Reach out to our support team and we will help you quickly with any additional questions.
